name: copywriting
tagline: Points writers to the monorepo's UI copy style guide before writing or auditing any user-facing text.
verdict: Tiny, safe pointer skill: description clearly states when to trigger and the single instruction (read the source-of-truth doc) is unambiguous and low-risk. Gaps are minor: no negative-trigger guidance and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body to prevent misfire on adjacent tasks.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
